summary.intent: Merge the main branch into issue-122, resolve any merge conflicts, then commit and push the result.
summary.outcome: Merge completed successfully with two conflicts resolved: kept both sides for local_llm_setup.rs (preserving branch's sample_system_info() alongside main's test guard), and accepted main's deletion of sandbox.rs since it was refactored into a module directory.

repo: sandbox.rs was refactored into a module directory on main — file deletion in merge conflicts may indicate a module restructuring, not a removal.
The project lives in a worktree at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/issue-122 under crates/gateway/src.

code.finding: Contains sample_system_info() added on issue-122 branch; main added a test guard — both changes are compatible and were merged together.

workflow: When a file is deleted on main during a merge conflict, check git history to determine whether it was deleted or restructured before accepting the deletion.
Verify branch-specific changes to conflicted files before resolving to avoid accidentally discarding work.

friction: sandbox.rs conflict required investigation to determine it was a refactor (module dir) rather than an outright deletion, adding diagnostic overhead.
